task: Fetch the current weather for Munich from the Open-Meteo API, format it as a brief morning weather update, and compose an email to kiu@ikangai.com with the weather report. Save the email draft to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Fetch the latest 5 GitHub issues from tmux/tmux using the API, categorize them by label (bug, feature, question), and generate a project health report. Save to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Read the sales data from /tmp/clive/sales.csv, compute monthly totals, and create both a CSV summary and an ASCII bar chart visualization. Save the chart to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo 'date,product,amount' > /tmp/clive/sales.csv && echo '2026-01-05,Widget,1200' >> /tmp/clive/sales.csv && echo '2026-01-15,Gadget,800' >> /tmp/clive/sales.csv && echo '2026-02-10,Widget,1500' >> /tmp/clive/sales.csv && echo '2026-02-20,Gadget,900' >> /tmp/clive/sales.csv && echo '2026-03-05,Widget,1800' >> /tmp/clive/sales.csv && echo '2026-03-25,Gadget,1100' >> /tmp/clive/sales.csv

task: Read the CRM contacts from /tmp/clive/contacts.json, find contacts tagged as 'follow-up', draft a personalized follow-up email for each, and save all drafts to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Process the monthly expenses from /tmp/clive/expenses.csv, generate a summary report with category totals, check which categories are over budget (from /tmp/clive/budgets.json), and compose an alert email to kiu@ikangai.com listing over-budget items. Save to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo 'date,category,amount' > /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '2026-04-01,Software,2500' >> /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '2026-04-03,Travel,3200' >> /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '2026-04-05,Software,1800' >> /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '2026-04-07,Office,500' >> /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '2026-04-08,Travel,1500' >> /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '{"Software":3000,"Travel":2000,"Office":1000}' > /tmp/clive/budgets.json

task: Analyze this week's git activity in the current repo (commits, files changed, contributors). Fetch the latest HN story about AI agents. Compile both into a team newsletter. Write to /tmp/clive/result.md.

Write a deployment script that: creates a tarball of the project, computes its checksum, writes deployment notes from the latest 5 commits, and saves everything to /tmp/clive/release/. Write the release summary to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Build a monitoring check: test 3 API endpoints (httpbin.org, jsonplaceholder, api.github.com) for response time and status code. If any is slow (>2s) or down, draft an alert email to kiu@ikangai.com. Write the monitoring report to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
